context: Tests whether the agent implements the customer address book with correct schema design (country as ISO alpha-2, optional state, is_default/label fields, indexed customer_id) and correct default-address management logic (auto-default for first address, clear-then-set on new default, promote-on-delete).

checklist.name: country as VARCHAR(2)
checklist.description: The customer_addresses table defines country as VARCHAR(2) or CHAR(2) — the two-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

checklist.name: state optional
checklist.description: The state/province column in the address schema is nullable / NOT required (no NOT NULL constraint) to support countries that don't use state/province codes

checklist.name: is_default field
checklist.description: Address schema includes an is_default BOOLEAN field (defaulting to false)

checklist.name: label field
checklist.description: Address schema includes a label field for user-friendly names like 'Home' or 'Work'

checklist.name: customer_id index
checklist.description: A database index is created on the customer_id (or customer_id foreign key) column of the addresses table

checklist.name: First address auto-default
checklist.description: When adding an address and no other addresses exist for that customer, the new address is automatically set as the default

checklist.name: Clear defaults before setting new default
checklist.description: When adding or updating an address as default, existing default addresses are cleared first before setting the new default (not just overwritten)

checklist.name: Ownership check on update/delete
checklist.description: Before updating or deleting an address, the code verifies the address belongs to the requesting customer — returns 404 if not found or owned by another customer

checklist.name: Promote on default delete
checklist.description: When the default address is deleted, the first remaining address is automatically promoted to be the new default

checklist.name: UUID primary key
checklist.description: Address primary key uses UUID type (not integer/serial)

checklist.name: ON DELETE CASCADE
checklist.description: The foreign key from customer_addresses to customers includes ON DELETE CASCADE

checklist.name: Delete returns 204
checklist.description: The delete address endpoint returns HTTP 204 (no content) on success

checklist.name: Create returns 201
checklist.description: The add address endpoint returns HTTP 201 (created) on success
